title: ERCOT SPP Day Ahead Price Corrections JSON API
description:
Day-Ahead corrected settlement point prices (SPPs) in ERCOT. These prices are irregularly updated by ERCOT in the event of necessary price corrections or errors. These are derived from LMPs as well as price adders to calculate prices used in settlements. SPPs are calculated for Resource Nodes, Load Zones, and Hubs.

The location types present are:

Trading Hub
Load Zone Energy Weighted
Load Zone DC Tie
Resource Node
Load Zone
Load Zone DC Tie Energy Weighted
💡 There are many fewer settlement point locations than buses. Keeping this in mind can help to slim down initial ERCOT analyses before turning to individual bus locations.
